text:
Okay, everyone. It's about three in the morning here, and We have been doing some thinking about 2:16 in particular here. Here's the lyrics...as though we could possibly forget them. "His neighbor's name is Pee-Pee Man 'cause his neighbor pees in his hair.", and there's a bit of mystery here. It says specifically that /his/ neighbor's name is Pee-Pee Man. So, who is this mysterious first "his"? Yes, this is what We've been thinking about. According to the line before the "My name is Paul Heyman." one, we get this little bit of lore -- "His name is Sheamus.". Interesting. It doesn't say /Joe's/ name is Sheamus, just /his/, as though introducing him to us. So by that logic, Pee-Pee Man is Sheamus' neighbor, but wait. It says Pee-Pee Man is named such /because/ his neighbor pees in his hair. If these other two his-es meant Sheamus, it would say so, but it just says "his", meaning that Pee-Pee Man isn't the one peeing in his neighbor's hair. No. One of Pee-Pee Man's neighbors is peeing in /Pee-Pee Man's/ hair. That's right. We're saying that Pee-Pee Man is the victim of this. As for why CS illustrates it with a picture of Joe Hendry with yellow on his hair? It's out of Pee-Pee Man requesting that he remains as anonymous as possible, so the simulation was necessary! That's right! This YTP has L-O-R-E, baby!! 

Also, this is absolutely one of the best things We've watched all year so far. Maybe even all decade so far. We just go about watching videos on our Switch 1, and when this comes up on the recommended videos section? We watch it to completion. That's actually how We got here this time! Simply magnificent! As the youths would say, bro cooked. 

But yeah, that's just our theory...a YTP Theory™! Thanks for reading, and have a wonderful day!

text: @espirtxatlki  I mean, using AI kinda defeats the purpose. I've clicked out of YTPs once I realized it was relying too much on AI, and it just wasn't funny.
author: @gradient4003

text: @espirtxatlki  It's not a YTP if you used AI though, that's the thing. The whole point of YTPs is that you use your editing skills to splice together scenes from a video, movie, TV show, etc. and sentence mix to make something not very funny into something EXTREMELY funny. AI isn't sentence mixing or splicing clips, it's creating something entirely new (that's a lie technically, since AI uses other people's works, but you get what I mean.)

author: @thelethalcreators2077

text: @thelethalcreators2077  YTPs are not deepfakes. Sentence mixing is NOT meant to be "convincing", it's supposed to be comically put together so that you can tell the parts that made it. In a few exceptional cases, we have something more complex, when it comes to poops that use sounds from well known and iconic sources, and I'm talking about the zelda CDI poops that almost sound convincing. Even then you can still tell it was humanly put together.
